name: Buffalo Chicken Wings 5
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tips from wings.
2. Cut wings in half at the joint.
3. Deep-fry wings in hot oil until golden, about 5 minutes.
Or bake wings in a preheated oven at 375°F for 30-40 minutes until browned.
4. Melt butter and combine with Tabasco Sauce. Add as much Tabasco Sauce as desired for heat.
5. Coat the wings with the hot butter mixture.
6. Serve with blue cheese dressing and chilled celery and carrot sticks.
